title: capsella australasica
intro: Capsella australasica, also known as the Australian shepherd's purse, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing menstrual cramps and relieving digestive issues, and it is often used to treat respiratory problems and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Capsella australasica is typically used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
